# Story 1.3: Common Infrastructure (Multi-tenant `$extends`, ProblemDetailsFilter, Pino, Bootstrap Hardening, `/health`)

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMad create-story workflow on 2026-05-10. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a developer,  
I want triển khai infrastructure dùng chung của backend (multi-tenant Prisma `$extends`, RFC 7807 `ProblemDetailsFilter`, Pino logging, Helmet/CORS/Swagger trong `main.ts`, `/health` endpoint, `RolesGuard`/`JwtAuthGuard` skeleton),  
so that mọi module business sau đó tự động được multi-tenant scope, error response chuẩn RFC 7807, và logging structured có traceId.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **Multi-tenant Prisma `$extends`:** Given schema đã có `tenant_id`, `store_id` trên business tables, when developer cập nhật `src/prisma/prisma.service.ts`, then `PrismaService` vẫn extends `PrismaClient` nhưng mọi query business model tự động yêu cầu/inject `tenantId` + `storeId` vào `where`/write data phù hợp; scope loại trừ root/auth models `Tenant`, `Store`, `User` theo AC; and unit test xác nhận query business không có tenant/store context throw `MissingTenantContextError`.
2. **Problem Details global filter:** Given NestJS app, when developer triển khai `ProblemDetailsFilter` global trong `src/common/filters/`, then mọi `HttpException` được format thành RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` với fields `type`, `title`, `status`, `detail`, `instance`, `traceId`; `type` lấy từ constants trong `src/common/errors/problem-types.ts`; `detail` được sanitize; raw stack không trả client.
3. **Pino structured logging + traceId:** Given `nestjs-pino` được install/configure, when request đi qua API, then mỗi request có `traceId` UUID v7 gắn vào response/log structured JSON; raw error stack chỉ log server-side cùng `traceId`; log level configurable qua env `LOG_LEVEL`.
4. **Bootstrap hardening:** Given `main.ts` bootstrap, when app khởi động, then Helmet active với CSP `default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'`; CORS configured từ env `VITE_API_BASE_URL` origin; global `ValidationPipe` dùng `whitelist: true`, `forbidNonWhitelisted: true`, `transform: true`; Swagger UI mount tại `/api/docs` chỉ trong dev; API prefix `/api/v1`.
5. **Health endpoint:** Given `health` module, when GET `/api/v1/health` được gọi không cần auth, then trả `200 OK` body `{ status: 'ok', traceId: '<uuid v7>' }`; endpoint này là contract cho FE connectivity ping.
6. **Guard/decorator skeleton:** Given `JwtAuthGuard` và `RolesGuard` skeleton trong `src/common/guards/`, when unit test chạy, then `JwtAuthGuard` parse Bearer token và validate JWT signature; `RolesGuard` đọc metadata từ `@Roles('admin'|'cashier')` decorator và allow/deny đúng role.
7. **Verification gates:** `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build` trong `pos-api/` pass; tests mới cover Prisma scope error, ProblemDetailsFilter, health controller, guards, và bootstrap/config helpers nếu tách được để test.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Cài dependencies infrastructure cho `pos-api` (AC: 2–6)
  - [x] Add runtime deps: `nestjs-pino`, `pino`, `helmet`, `@nestjs/swagger`, `swagger-ui-express`, `class-validator`, `class-transformer`, `@nestjs/passport`, `passport`, `passport-jwt`, `@nestjs/jwt`, `@nestjs/throttler`, `bcrypt`, `uuid@11.x`.
  - [x] Add type deps nếu cần: `@types/passport-jwt`, `@types/bcrypt`, `@types/uuid` chỉ khi package không tự cung cấp type; không đổi package manager khỏi npm.
  - [x] Add/update `.env.example`: `LOG_LEVEL`, `VITE_API_BASE_URL`, JWT secret/config cần cho guard tests/dev; không commit `.env` thật.
- [x] Thiết lập traceId/request context dùng Pino (AC: 2, 3, 5)
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/utils/trace-id.ts` dùng `uuidv7()` từ `uuid` package locked 11.x; không dùng UUID v4.
  - [x] Configure `LoggerModule.forRoot(...)` trong `AppModule` với `pinoHttp.genReqId` sinh/nhận `X-Trace-Id`, `customProps`/request context expose traceId, `level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL ?? 'info'`.
  - [x] Đảm bảo response header `X-Trace-Id` được set cho request thường và error path.
- [x] Implement RFC 7807 ProblemDetailsFilter (AC: 2, 3)
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/errors/problem-types.ts` với URI constants ổn định, tối thiểu: `about:blank`, `https://pos.example/errors/validation`, `https://pos.example/errors/unauthorized`, `https://pos.example/errors/forbidden`, `https://pos.example/errors/not-found`, `https://pos.example/errors/conflict`, `https://pos.example/errors/internal`, `https://pos.example/errors/missing-tenant-context`.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/filters/problem-details.filter.ts`; map `HttpException.getStatus()` sang title/type; sanitize detail để không lộ stack, SQL, env, JWT secret, password/token/hash.
  - [x] Log raw error object/stack server-side bằng Pino logger kèm `traceId`; client chỉ nhận sanitized details.
  - [x] Set response content-type `application/problem+json`; giữ `instance` là URL path hiện tại đã bao gồm `/api/v1/...`.
- [x] Implement tenant context + Prisma `$extends` guardrail (AC: 1)
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/errors/missing-tenant-context.error.ts` hoặc equivalent class `MissingTenantContextError` map được sang Problem Details 500/403 theo quyết định rõ ràng; message client phải sanitized.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/decorators/tenant-context.decorator.ts` và type `TenantContext { tenantId: string; storeId: string; userId?: string; role?: 'admin' | 'cashier' }` nếu cần.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/middleware/tenant-scope.middleware.ts` hoặc request-context provider (AsyncLocalStorage được khuyến nghị) để lưu tenant/store từ request sau auth; story này có thể skeleton vì auth endpoints ở 1.5, nhưng unit test phải set context được.
  - [x] Cập nhật `src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` để business model operations (`Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `ProductOptionGroup`, `MenuVersion`; sau này mở rộng `Order`, `OrderItem`, `SyncLog`, `OrderVoid`) yêu cầu context và tự thêm `tenantId`/`storeId` cho read/write. Không scope `Tenant`, `Store`, `User`, `RefreshToken` ở lớp auth/root theo AC.
  - [x] Chặn hoặc document rõ `$queryRaw`/`$executeRaw`: không expose helper raw query không scoped; nếu giữ method kế thừa Prisma, add lint/test/review note vì code review cấm raw query không scope.
  - [x] Tests phải chứng minh business query thiếu context throw `MissingTenantContextError`, có context inject đúng `tenantId`/`storeId`, và auth/root model không bị scope sai.
- [x] Harden Nest bootstrap trong `src/main.ts` (AC: 4)
  - [x] Import/use Helmet với CSP chính xác từ AC; không làm CSP lỏng hơn để Swagger ở production.
  - [x] Configure CORS từ env `VITE_API_BASE_URL` origin; nếu env trống trong dev/test, default an toàn cho local (`http://localhost:5173`) và document.
  - [x] Set `app.setGlobalPrefix('api/v1')` trước Swagger/route expectations; verify health endpoint path là `/api/v1/health`.
  - [x] Register global `ValidationPipe` đúng options.
  - [x] Register global `ProblemDetailsFilter` bằng Nest DI hoặc instance có logger/adapter đúng; tránh duplicate manual filter gây mất DI.
  - [x] Mount Swagger `/api/docs` only khi `NODE_ENV !== 'production'`; dùng `DocumentBuilder` với Bearer auth metadata.
- [x] Thêm `HealthModule` (AC: 5)
  - [x] Tạo `src/health/health.module.ts` và `src/health/health.controller.ts`.
  - [x] GET `/health` no auth, trả `{ status: 'ok', traceId }`; không query DB trong story này trừ khi test ổn định, vì endpoint dùng cho FE connectivity ping nhẹ.
  - [x] Import `HealthModule` vào `AppModule`.
- [x] Thêm guard/decorator skeleton cho auth sau này (AC: 6)
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/decorators/roles.decorator.ts` với roles `'admin' | 'cashier'` hoặc map từ Prisma `Role` cẩn thận (`Admin`/`Cashier`) và normalize rõ.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/decorators/current-user.decorator.ts` skeleton để controller sau dùng, không tự tạo auth endpoints.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts` theo Nest Passport/JWT pattern hoặc lightweight guard dùng `JwtService.verifyAsync`; phải parse `Authorization: Bearer <token>` và attach user payload/context.
  - [x] Tạo `src/common/guards/roles.guard.ts` dùng `Reflector` đọc roles metadata; admin/cashier comparison phải nhất quán với JWT payload và Prisma enum.
- [x] Tests + verification (AC: 1–7)
  - [x] Unit test `ProblemDetailsFilter`: 400/401/403/404/409/500 mapping, content-type, sanitized detail, `traceId`, không leak stack.
  - [x] Unit test Prisma tenant extension/context: missing context throw, inject scope, excluded models allowed.
  - [x] Unit test health controller returns status ok + UUID v7-like traceId.
  - [x] Unit test guards/decorator: Bearer parse/JWT verify success/fail; `RolesGuard` allow/deny.
  - [x] Run gates: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test -- --runInBand` (nếu Jest flake), `npm run build`.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- Story này chỉ là backend common infrastructure. Không implement `/auth/login`, `/auth/refresh`, logout/revocation endpoints (Story 1.5/1.6); không seed data (1.4); không frontend shell/connectivity hook (1.7/2.10); không orders/menu business APIs. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.3`; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Sequence-clean-dependency`]
- Code trong `common/` chỉ được chứa cross-cutting concerns (filter, guards, decorators, middleware, errors, utils). Business logic vẫn phải nằm ở feature modules sau này. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`]

### Existing code/current state to preserve

- `pos-api/src/main.ts` hiện chỉ `NestFactory.create(AppModule)` và listen `PORT ?? 3000`; story này update bootstrap nhưng phải giữ app start/build pass. [Source: `pos-api/src/main.ts`]
- `pos-api/src/app.module.ts` hiện import `PrismaModule`; thêm `LoggerModule`, `HealthModule` additive, không remove baseline `AppController`/`AppService` trừ khi tests được cập nhật sạch. [Source: `pos-api/src/app.module.ts`]
- `pos-api/src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` hiện là minimal `PrismaClient` với `$connect/$disconnect`; Story 1.2 cố ý chưa thêm `$extends`. Đây là file UPDATE chính, phải đọc và preserve lifecycle hooks. [Source: `pos-api/src/prisma/prisma.service.ts`; `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#Completion-Notes-List`]
- Prisma schema hiện đã có menu business models với `tenantId` + `storeId`: `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `MenuVersion`; `ProductOptionGroup` có composite PK không chứa tenant/store trực tiếp nhưng liên kết qua Product/OptionGroup. Extension cần xử lý model này cẩn thận, tránh inject fields không tồn tại. [Source: `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`]
- Package hiện có NestJS `^11.0.1`, Prisma `^7.8.0`, TS strict; chưa có Pino/Swagger/Helmet/JWT/class-validator deps. [Source: `pos-api/package.json`]

### Architecture compliance and critical guardrails

- Stack locked: NestJS 11.x, Prisma 7.x, PostgreSQL 16, TypeScript strict, Jest. Không đổi framework/ORM/package manager. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#1-Technology-Stack--Versions`]
- Backend architecture must follow Controller → Service → Repository → PrismaService. Story này tạo infrastructure để later repositories dùng, không được để controller/service sau bypass PrismaService. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#4-Cấu-trúc-Module`]
- API version prefix bắt buộc `/api/v1`; REST paths kebab-case plural; JSON field camelCase; errors RFC 7807. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#3-Naming-Convention-4-Boundary`; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#API--Mẫu-Giao-tiếp`]
- Error response must never be custom `{ success, message, code }`; must include `type`, `title`, `status`, `detail`, `instance`, `traceId`. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Ví-dụ-Đúng-vs-Sai-Anti-pattern`]
- CSP from auth/token-storage decision is security-critical because access token will live in IndexedDB later; do not loosen CSP globally. Swagger is dev-only to avoid production CSP/security compromise. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#2-Quy-tắc-Bắt-buộc-Thi-hành`; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Xác-thực--Bảo-mật`]
- UUID v7 is mandatory for traceId/new IDs; use `uuid@11.x` `uuidv7()`, not `crypto.randomUUID()`/UUID v4. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#1-Technology-Stack--Versions`; `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#UUID-v7-resolution-important`]

### Multi-tenant `$extends` implementation guidance

- Recommended design: use Node `AsyncLocalStorage<TenantContext>` behind `TenantScopeService`/middleware so Prisma extension can read current tenant/store without passing scope through every repository method. Unit tests can call a helper like `runWithTenantContext(context, () => prisma.category.findMany())`.
- `$extends` should be Prisma Client extension/query extension, not ad-hoc repository filtering. Purpose is to make later business services safe by default. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Kiến-trúc-Dữ-liệu`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md#4-Cấu-trúc-Module`]
- Business models now in schema: `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `MenuVersion`. `ProductOptionGroup` lacks `tenantId/storeId`; either scope nested through related `product`/`optionGroup` where supported, or explicitly reject direct unscoped access until repository uses scoped product/optionGroup operations. Document chosen behavior in tests.
- Excluded/root/auth models per AC: `Tenant`, `Store`, `User`; keep `RefreshToken` auth-scoped too unless there is a tested reason to tenant-scope it. Do not accidentally break Story 1.5 auth lookup by requiring tenant context before login.
- Writes must not allow caller-supplied mismatched `tenantId/storeId` to override context. If data contains `tenantId/storeId`, assert equality or replace with context; mismatches should throw a sanitized tenant context error.
- Reads must merge existing `where` with context using `AND` to preserve caller filters; do not overwrite user-provided filters.

### ProblemDetails details to make tests unambiguous

- Suggested response shape:

```json
{
  "type": "https://pos.example/errors/validation",
  "title": "Bad Request",
  "status": 400,
  "detail": "Validation failed",
  "instance": "/api/v1/example",
  "traceId": "019...uuid-v7"
}
```

- `HttpException` response can be string/object/array from ValidationPipe; normalize to safe string or safe validation summary. Never echo raw Prisma errors, JWT secrets, stack traces, SQL queries, token strings, password hashes.
- For unknown non-Http errors, return status 500, type `https://pos.example/errors/internal`, title `Internal Server Error`, detail generic Vietnamese/English consistent text; raw error only in Pino log.

### File structure requirements

Expected new/updated files:

```text
pos-api/
├── package.json / package-lock.json           # UPDATE deps/scripts if needed
├── .env.example                               # UPDATE LOG_LEVEL, VITE_API_BASE_URL if missing
└── src/
    ├── main.ts                                # UPDATE bootstrap hardening
    ├── app.module.ts                          # UPDATE LoggerModule/HealthModule imports
    ├── prisma/
    │   └── prisma.service.ts                  # UPDATE $extends + lifecycle preserve
    ├── common/
    │   ├── decorators/{roles,current-user,tenant-context}.decorator.ts
    │   ├── errors/{problem-types,missing-tenant-context.error}.ts
    │   ├── filters/problem-details.filter.ts
    │   ├── guards/{jwt-auth,roles}.guard.ts
    │   ├── middleware/tenant-scope.middleware.ts
    │   └── utils/trace-id.ts
    └── health/
        ├── health.module.ts
        ├── health.controller.ts
        └── health.controller.spec.ts
```

- Tests should be co-located `.spec.ts` under `src/` per NestJS/Jest current setup; e2e not required unless helpful. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Vị-trí-test`]
- Do not modify `pos-web/` in this story.

### Previous Story Intelligence

- Story 1.2 completed Prisma 7.8.0 foundation and first migration; it deliberately left `PrismaService` minimal for this story. Reuse it instead of recreating Prisma module. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#Completion-Notes-List`]
- Story 1.2 resolved UUID conflict: Prisma `uuid()` is v4, so app/seed must supply UUID v7. Apply same rule to trace IDs and any generated IDs here. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#UUID-v7-resolution-important`]
- Verification gates that passed in Story 1.2: Docker health, Prisma validate/format/generate, typecheck, lint, Jest, build. For this story minimum is typecheck/lint/test/build; Prisma schema should not change. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#Completion-Notes-List`]
- Continue npm and commit lockfile updates; do not introduce pnpm/yarn. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-ha-tang-postgresql-prisma-foundation-schema-first-migration.md#Previous-Story-Intelligence`]

### Git intelligence

- Recent commits show additive story work: `3c58e23 feat(pos-api): add prisma foundation schema`, `cb641e8 us 1-1`. Follow same pattern: update implementation story record during dev, keep generated/client artifacts out of git, commit source + lockfile + tests.

### Latest technical notes

- Web check on 2026-05-10 found `@nestjs/swagger` latest `11.4.2`; use NestJS 11-compatible latest unless npm resolves a newer compatible 11.x. [Source: npm search result 2026-05-10]
- Web check found `@nestjs/jwt` latest `11.0.2`; keep major 11 compatible with NestJS 11. [Source: npm search result 2026-05-10]
- `nestjs-pino` supports request-context logging; prefer `LoggerModule` integration over a custom logging interceptor unless a small interceptor is needed only to set `X-Trace-Id`. [Source: pino-nestjs usage docs/search 2026-05-10]
- Prisma Client extensions are the selected architecture mechanism for multi-tenancy; do not implement only manual repository filters and claim AC complete.

### Testing and verification requirements

Minimum commands before moving to review:

```bash
cd pos-api
npm run typecheck
npm run lint
npm test -- --runInBand
npm run build
```

Suggested focused tests:

- `src/common/filters/problem-details.filter.spec.ts`
- `src/prisma/prisma.service.spec.ts` or tenant extension unit test with Prisma method mocked/spied
- `src/health/health.controller.spec.ts`
- `src/common/guards/jwt-auth.guard.spec.ts`
- `src/common/guards/roles.guard.spec.ts`

## Project Structure Notes

- Alignment: story follows architecture tree for `src/common`, `src/prisma`, `src/health`, and bootstrap in `src/main.ts`. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#Repo-pos-api-NestJS`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md#4-Cấu-trúc-Module`]
- Variance to handle explicitly: `ProductOptionGroup` does not have direct tenant/store fields, so `$extends` cannot blindly inject `tenantId/storeId` into every model. Dev must implement a tested special case/rejection strategy; otherwise runtime Prisma validation will fail.
- Current `AppController` baseline may still serve `/` unless changed. Do not let it bypass ProblemDetails for errors; if kept, it should remain harmless smoke endpoint under `/api/v1` after global prefix.

## Validation Notes

- Checklist review applied: story prevents wrong file locations, fake `$extends` completion via manual repository filters, UUID v4 trace IDs, unscoped business queries, breaking login-before-tenant auth path, leaking stack/SQL/JWT details to client, Swagger/CSP production looseness, and missing tests.
- Key ambiguity resolved for Dev Agent: `ProductOptionGroup` lacks direct tenant/store fields, so it must be special-cased or blocked from direct unscoped access; do not blindly inject fields.
- Story is ready for `dev-story` implementation.

### Review Findings

Không có blocker cần hỏi user. Dev Agent cần tự chọn chi tiết implementation của AsyncLocalStorage/extension shape nhưng phải chứng minh bằng tests theo AC.

### Agent Model Used

vllm/cx/gpt-5.5

### Debug Log References

- 2026-05-10: Cài deps infrastructure bằng npm; cập nhật sprint status sang in-progress.
- 2026-05-10: Implement traceId/Pino, ProblemDetailsFilter, tenant scope Prisma extension, bootstrap hardening, health endpoint, guards/decorators.
- 2026-05-10: ProductOptionGroup được chặn direct access trong Prisma extension vì không có tenantId/storeId trực tiếp; test ghi nhận guardrail này.
- 2026-05-10: Chạy và sửa lỗi typecheck/lint/tests/build đến khi pass.
- 2026-05-10: Patch review findings: loại bỏ pattern `return this.$extends(...)` trong `PrismaService`, register `TenantScopeMiddleware`, chuyển `@types/bcrypt` và `@types/passport-jwt` sang devDependencies, giữ guardrail raw query bằng documentation/task note.

### Completion Notes List

- Hoàn tất common infrastructure backend cho Story 1.3: Pino traceId UUID v7, RFC 7807 ProblemDetailsFilter, Helmet/CORS/Swagger/ValidationPipe, `/api/v1/health`, JWT/Roles guard skeleton.
- PrismaService dùng Prisma `$extends` query extension để auto-scope business models có tenant/store và chặn thiếu context bằng `MissingTenantContextError`; root/auth models không bị scope.
- `ProductOptionGroup` bị block direct access để tránh inject tenant/store vào model không có field; repositories sau phải thao tác qua Product/OptionGroup scoped path hoặc thêm strategy riêng.
- Verification pass: `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm test -- --runInBand`, `npm run build`.
- Resolved review finding: `PrismaService` không còn trực tiếp `return this.$extends(...)`; dùng Proxy giữ lifecycle methods trên service instance và delegate Prisma model access sang extended client.
- Resolved review finding: `TenantScopeMiddleware` được register trong `AppModule` cho mọi route để JWT/user tenant context đi vào AsyncLocalStorage trước Prisma scope.
- Resolved review finding: `@types/bcrypt` và `@types/passport-jwt` đã chuyển sang `devDependencies`; package-lock cập nhật.
- Raw query bypass vẫn không được expose thêm helper; story task/documentation tiếp tục ghi rõ `$queryRaw`/`$executeRaw` là guardrail review/lint cần chặn khi business code phát sinh.
